spec_match.rationale: Uses await using with [Symbol.asyncDispose] and demonstrates that the disposer runs at scope exit including on throw — the TC39 proposal.

interactive.rationale: Two scenarios (success / throw) with live log of disposer firing.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises scenarios + log showing async disposer fires; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Now covers body errors, disposer errors, native SuppressedError chaining, and LIFO disposal order for multiple await using declarations.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked happy path, throws midway, body + dispose throw, and nested LIFO order. The native path logged SuppressedError with error=dispose failure and suppressed=body failure, then logged second-before-first disposal for nested resources; console was clean, network requests were 200/204.
